findings.message: redis-exporter service depends on undefined 'redis' service. The service reference 'redis' in depends_on and REDIS_ADDR environment variable has no corresponding service definition in any compose file (dev.yml, staging.yml, prod.yml, services.yml, or base.yml).
findings.suggestion: Add a redis service definition to the appropriate compose file(s). If redis should be present in dev/staging/prod, define it alongside postgres-exporter in observability.yml or in the respective environment overlays. Verify APP_REDIS_URL environment variable is set if the app needs redis connectivity.
